creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #0)

I distinctly remember that when I worked on that 2 years ago (https://reviews.freebsd.org/D25800, https://reviews.freebsd.org/D25801, https://reviews.freebsd.org/D25803/, https://reviews.freebsd.org/D25805, and https://reviews.freebsd.org/D25808), bcr@ (or maybe someone else from doceng@) specifically told me not to remove portsnap altogether yet. doceng@, is it time to revisit that decision?
